_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop a plan to investigate alleged crime, violation, or suspicious activity utilizing computers and the internet.
reference_document_element_description: Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies covering quality, privacy, security, ethics, and responsible use.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.411), RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.409).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.300). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [activity, alleged, computers, crime, develop, internet] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, communicate, covering, data, enforce, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.873, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.8%). "Develop a plan to investigate alleged crime, violation, or suspicious activity u" and "Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies coverin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.438 > STS 0.300 (gap +0.138). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.2%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [activity, alleged, computers, crime, develop, internet]. WIDAI terms: [ai, communicate, covering, data, enforce, enterprise].
